items.title: Tariffs costs and refunds take the spotlight as Home Depot, TJX and other retailers report earnings this week
items.description: The Supreme Court struck down most of the Trump administration’s tariffs, but uncertainty remains for store chains.

items.title: The sobering way most Americans plan to use their tax refunds this year
items.description: Tax refunds are projected to be larger on average — and Americans are thinking hard about how to spend them.

items.title: Why you shouldn’t fall in love with the S&P 500
items.description: What Wall Street doesn’t tell you about the long-term return on your investments.

items.title: This is the biggest weakness in most people’s budgets. Here’s how to fix it.
items.description: “Most people don’t blow up their budget because they’re careless,” one financial planner said. It happens because they neglect this critical detail.

items.title: United Airlines’ best loyalty perks will soon be reserved for its cardholders. Is the card worth it?
